ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ANCIENT_WRITING.pages.EL:
The answer was elegance.

Of course.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ANCIENT_WRITING.pages.IN:
Scaling the city, you notice a wall covered in the writing of [gold][sine]Ancients[/sine][/gold]. As you try to wrap your head around what the puzzling symbols and glyphs could mean, the writing begins to [blue][sine]glow[/sine][/blue].

Suddenly, the message becomes clear...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ANCIENT_WRITING.title: Ancient Writing
A man with an eyepatch and a devilish grin strides up to you.

"Hey there, stranger. Interested in advancing science? I can make you stronger than any training or blessing. You're gonna need it if you're one of those heroes with a death wish."

[sine]"Whad'ya say?"[/sine]
Requires: [blue]2[/blue] or more cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-AUGMENTER.pages.JAX.desc:
[sine]"Excellent."[/sine]

The man hands over a dangerous looking syringe filled with a [blue][sine]glowing liquid[/sine][/blue] before skulking off into a shadowy alleyway.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-AUGMENTER.pages.MUTAGENS:
[sine]"Marvelous."[/sine]

You quaff the mysterious substance. Immediately, you are invigorated and feel your muscle fibers [jitter]twitch.[/jitter]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-AUGMENTER.pages.TRANSFOR:
[sine]"Superb."[/sine]

The man injects you with three unknown substances and pulls out a notepad. As you begin to feel light-headed, he starts to frantically write down notes.

Losing track of time completely, by the time you regain your senses, the shady character has disappeared.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-AUGMENTER.title: Augmenter
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.pages.BANANA.de: You eat the [gold]banana[/gold]. It is nutritious and slightly [blue]magical[/blue], healing you.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.pages.BOX.descr:
You grab the box. Inside you find a [gold]relic[/gold]!

However, you really craved the donut...

You are filled with [jitter]sadness[/jitter], but mostly [red]regret[/red].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.pages.BOX_REBAL:
You grab the box. The string it was attached to [jitter]snaps[/jitter] as soon as you touch it, and the box falls into your arms. It's quite [red]heavy[/red]. You notice a note on it:

"Recipient: [gold]Merchant.[/gold]"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.pages.DONUT.des: You eat the [gold]donut[/gold]. It really hits the spot! Your Max HP increases.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.pages.INITIAL.d:
As you make your way down a long corridor you see a [gold]banana[/gold], a [gold]donut[/gold], and a [gold]box[/gold] [jitter]floating[/jitter] about. No... upon closer inspection they are tied to strings coming from holes in the ceiling. There is a quiet [sine]cackling[/sine] from above as you approach the objects.

What do you do?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.pages.INITIAL.o: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BIG_FISH.title: Big Fish
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BONFIRE_SPIRITS.title: Bonfire Spirits
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BONFIRE_SPIRITS.pages.IN: You happen upon a group of what looks like [purple]purple fire spirits[/purple] [sine]dancing[/sine] around a large bonfire.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BONFIRE_SPIRITS.pages.AP:
The spirits toss small bones and fragments into the fire, which [sine]brilliantly[/sine] [sine]erupts[/sine] each time.
As you approach, the spirits all turn to you, expectantly...
Receive a reward based on the offer.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BONFIRE_SPIRITS.pages.OF:
You toss an offering into the bonfire.

However, the spirits aren't happy that you offered a [purple]Curse[/purple]... The card fizzles a meek black smoke. You receive a... [purple][sine]something[/sine][/purple] in return.

You toss an offering into the bonfire.

Nothing happens...
The spirits seem to be ignoring you now. Disappointing...

You toss an offering into the bonfire.

The flames grow slightly brighter.
The spirits continue dancing. You feel slightly warmer from their presence..
You [green]heal[/green] [blue]5[/blue] HP.

You toss an offering into the bonfire.

The flames erupt, growing significantly stronger!
The spirits dance around you excitedly, filling you with a [sine]sense[/sine] [sine]of[/sine] [sine]warmth.[/sine]
You are [green]healed[/green] to full HP.

You toss an offering into the bonfire.

The flames [jitter]burst[/jitter], nearly knocking you off your feet, as the fire [jitter]doubles[/jitter] in strength.
The spirits dance around you excitedly before [sine]merging[/sine] [sine]into[/sine] [sine]your[/sine] [sine]form,[/sine] filling you with warmth and strength.
Your Max HP increases by [blue]10[/blue] and you are [green]healed[/green] to full HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BONFIRE_SPIRITS.pages.NO:
You toss an offering into the bonfire.

Nothing happens...
The spirits seem to be ignoring you now. Disappointing...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CLERIC.pages.HEAL.descri:
A warm golden light envelops your body and dissipates.

The creature grins. "Cleric best healer. [jitter]Have[/jitter] [jitter]a[/jitter] [jitter]good[/jitter] [jitter]day!"[/jitter]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CLERIC.pages.INITIAL.des:
A strange blue humanoid with a golden helm(?) approaches you with a huge smile.

[jitter]"Hello[/jitter] [jitter]friend![/jitter] I am [blue]Cleric![/blue] Are you interested in my services?!" the creature shouts, loudly.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CLERIC.pages.INITIAL.opt: Lose [red]{PurifyCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CLERIC.pages.LEAVE.descr: You don't trust this [blue]"Cleric"[/blue], so you leave.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CLERIC.pages.PURIFY.desc:
A cold blue flame envelops your body and dissipates.

The creature grins. "Cleric talented. [jitter]Have[/jitter] [jitter]a[/jitter] [jitter]good[/jitter] [jitter]day!"[/jitter]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CLERIC.title: The Cleric
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-COLOSSEUM.pages.FIGHT_IN:
[sine]Groggy[/sine] and with a [jitter]throbbing[/jitter] head, you awaken to find yourself thrown in the center of a massive stadium with an overflowing audience of [blue]Slavers,[/blue] [purple]Cultists,[/purple] and other denizens of the City!

An armored giant with a [gold]golden crown[/gold] bellows at you from atop,
[jitter]"WE[/jitter] [jitter]NOW[/jitter] [jitter]BEGIN[/jitter] [jitter]THE[/jitter] [jitter]4200TH[/jitter] [jitter]COMBAT!!!!"[/jitter]
A gate on the opposite side opens...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-COLOSSEUM.pages.FLEE.des: You slip through the crack in the wall and escape into the city streets. The roar of the crowd fades behind you.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-COLOSSEUM.pages.FLEE_REB:
You slip through the crack in the wall and escape into the city streets. The roar of the crowd fades behind you.

Your experience in the [gold]Colosseum[/gold] was a bit [purple]harrowing[/purple], to say the least.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-COLOSSEUM.pages.POST_SLA:
[jitter]"WELL[/jitter] [jitter]DONE,[/jitter] [jitter]WEAKLING!"[/jitter]
The giant mock claps whilst he riles up the crowd with exaggerated gestures.
[gold][sine]Gold[/sine][/gold] [sine]and[/sine] [gold][sine]confetti[/sine][/gold] [sine]shower[/sine] [sine]you![/sine]
[jitter]"TIME[/jitter] [jitter]FOR[/jitter] [jitter]THE[/jitter] [jitter]REAL[/jitter] [jitter]CHALLENGE!!"[/jitter]

The last battle left a small opening in the Colosseum's wall, you can easily escape through there while everyone is distracted.
Do you stay and fight?
A powerful fight with many rewards.
[red]Downgrade[/red] a random card. Gain [green]5[/green] Max HP. Escape.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-COLOSSEUM.title: The Colosseum
[gold]"Excellent!"[/gold]

As the ghostly shape speaks, you notice its large mouth opening wider and wider. [purple][sine]Thick black smoke[/sine][/purple] spews forth and envelops the room. You cannot see or breathe...

Just before you lose consciousness, the sensation stops.

Whatever those things were, they are gone now. You continue on, feeling rather [blue]hollow[/blue].

As you continue your ascent, [purple][sine]thick black smoke[/sine][/purple] begins to billow out of the ground and walls around you, coalescing into three masked forms that start to speak.

[sine]"Another puppet of[/sine] [gold][sine]Neow[/sine][/gold] [sine]I think."[/sine]
[red][jitter]"AGREED! SHE ALWAYS MAKES THE FUNNEST TOYS!"[/jitter][/red]

You notice an over-sized grin as the third addresses you.
"Ignore the others... Would you like a taste of our [gold][sine]power?"[/sine][/gold]
Add [blue]{ApparitionCount}[/blue] [gold]Apparitions[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] Max HP.

"How disappointing..."
[sine]"You will join us sooner or later."[/sine]
[red][jitter]"HA HA HA HAHAHA!"[/jitter][/red]

The shapes fade away, leaving only the unnerving laughter ringing in your ears.

"How disappointing..."
[sine]"You will join us sooner or later."[/sine]
[red][jitter]"HA HA HA HAHAHA!"[/jitter][/red]

The shapes fade away, leaving only the unnerving laughter ringing in your ears.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-COUNCIL_OF_GHOSTS.title: Council of Ghosts
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.INITIA:
In an abandoned temple, you find a giant book, open, riddled with [purple][jitter]cryptic writings.[/jitter][/purple]

As you try to interpret the elaborate script, it begins to [blue][sine]shift[/sine][/blue] and [blue][sine]morph[/sine][/blue] into writing you are familiar with.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.LAST_P:
Those resurrected by [gold]Neow[/gold] remember only fragments of their past selves, cursed to fight for eternity.

As you near the final page, your [red][jitter]old wounds begin to reopen![/jitter][/red]
You exit, feeling a [purple][sine]dark energy emanating[/sine][/purple] from the book on the pedestal.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.OBTAIN: Upon finishing the tome, you decide to take it with you. With proof in hand, will you retain your memories?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.PAGE_1:
Odd. The book seems to be about an [gold]Ancient[/gold] named [gold]Neow[/gold].

This piques your interest, but you have a general feeling of [purple][sine]malaise.[/sine][/purple]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.PAGE_2:
The Ancient of Resurrection, [gold]Neow[/gold], was exiled to the bottom of the Spire.

You feel compelled to read more, but your body begins to [red][sine]ache.[/sine][/red]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.PAGE_3:
Seeking vengeance, [gold]Neow[/gold] blesses outsiders, using them for her own purposes.

You are starting to feel very [red][sine]weak and tired...[/sine][/red]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.PULL_A:
With incredible strain and willpower, you resist the trance of the tome.

You turn and exit the temple, feeling like parts of you have been [blue][sine]changed[/sine][/blue] by the tome's influence...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.pages.STOP.d:
With incredible strain and willpower, you resist the trance of the tome and [jitter]SLAM[/jitter] it shut.

You turn and exit the temple, feeling [blue][sine]drained...[/sine][/blue]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CURSED_TOME.title: Cursed Tome
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.loss: {character} decided to give the [gold][b]{event}[/b][/gold] some company.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.pages.FI:
[jitter][red]Ambushed!![/red][/jitter]
While searching the adventurer you are caught off guard!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.pages.IN:
You come across a [red]dead adventurer[/red] on the floor.
His [blue]pants have been stolen![/blue] Also, he looks to have been [jitter][red]eviscerated[/red][/jitter] [jitter][red]and[/red][/jitter] [jitter][red]chopped[/red][/jitter] by giant claws.
Though his [gold]possessions are still intact[/gold], you're in no mind to find out what happened here...

You come across a [red]dead adventurer[/red] on the floor.
His [blue]pants have been stolen![/blue] Also, it looks as though he's been [jitter][red]gouged[/red][/jitter] [jitter][red]and[/red][/jitter] [jitter][red]trampled[/red][/jitter] by a horned beast.
Though his [gold]possessions are still intact[/gold], you're in no mind to find out what happened here...

You come across a [red]dead adventurer[/red] on the floor.
His [blue]pants have been stolen![/blue] Also, the armor and face appear to be [jitter][red]scoured[/red][/jitter] [jitter][red]by[/red][/jitter] [jitter][red]flames.[/red][/jitter]
Though his [gold]possessions are still intact[/gold], you're in no mind to find out what happened here...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.pages.WA:
Following your intuition, you determine that sticking around any longer than necessary won't end well.
Walking away from the scene, you feel [blue]good[/blue] about your decision.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.pages.NO:
Hmm, couldn't find anything...
Continue searching?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.pages.SU: Looks like you searched all his belongings without a hitch!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DEAD_ADVENTURER.title: Dead Adventurer
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DESIGNER_IN_SPIRE.title: Designer In-Spire
You discover a [sine][green]colorful[/green][/sine] shop with the banner "IN-SPIRE" and walk in to see what's inside.
"No, no way. Nope. Can't let you in!"

A man with ridiculous clothing appears at the entrance to bar you.

"This will not do, no no. What is this style? [jitter]Disgusting![/jitter] Are you [red]bleeeeding?[/red] [purple][sine]Groooss.[/sine][/purple] [jitter]Business??[/jitter] You a customer? Fine. [sine]Whaaatever."[/sine]
He lets out an exaggerated sigh and points at a list of services.

The services seem fine, but you would rather punch this smug man in his smug face.
Lose [red]{FullServiceCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Remove a card and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

You punch him so hard your fist hurts.
"My [jitter]FACE!![/jitter] Now I'll have to-"

He fainted. Who's [purple][sine]groooss[/sine][/purple] and [red]bleeeeding[/red] now?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DUPLICATOR.title: Duplicator
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DUPLICATOR.pages.INITIAL: Before you lies a decorated altar to some ancient entity.
Lose [red]{KneelDamage}[/red] HP. [gold]Duplicate[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DUPLICATOR.pages.PRAY.de: You kneel respectfully. A ghastly mirror image appears from the shrine and collides into you.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DUPLICATOR.pages.LEAVE.d: You ignore the shrine, confident in your choice.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FACE_TRADER.title: Face Trader
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FACE_TRADER.pages.INITIA:
You walk by an eerie statue holding several masks...
Something behind you softly whispers,
[sine]"Stop."[/sine]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FACE_TRADER.pages.MAIN.d:
You swerve around to face the statue which is now facing you!
On closer inspection, it's not a statue but a statuesque, gaunt man. Is he even breathing?

[sine]"Face.[/sine] [sine]Let[/sine] [sine]me[/sine] [sine]touch?[/sine] [sine]Maybe[/sine] [sine]trade?"[/sine]
[sine]"Compensation?[/sine] [sine]Compensation."[/sine]
Mechanically, he cranes out a neat stack of [gold]gold[/gold] and places it into your pouch.

[sine]"What[/sine] [sine]a[/sine] [sine]nice[/sine] [sine]face.[/sine] [sine]Nice[/sine] [sine]face."[/sine]
While he touches your face, you begin to feel your life drain out of it!
During this, his mask falls off and shatters. Screaming, he quickly covers his face with all six arms dropping even more masks! Amidst all the screaming and shattering, you escape.

His face was completely blank.
[sine]"For[/sine] [sine]me?[/sine] [jitter]FOR[/jitter] [jitter]ME?[/jitter] [sine]Oh[/sine] [sine]yes..[/sine] [sine]Yes.[/sine] [sine]Yes..[/sine] [sine]mmm..."[/sine]

You see one of his arms flicker, and your face is in its hand! Your face has been swapped.

[sine]"Nice[/sine] [sine]face.[/sine] [sine]Nice[/sine] [sine]face."[/sine]
[sine]"Stop.[/sine] [sine]Stop.[/sine] [sine]Stop.[/sine] [sine]Stop.[/sine] [sine]Stop."[/sine]

This was probably the right call.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FALLING.pages.ATTACK.des: You are able to latch on to the wall, and manage to make a short hop onto another stable platform.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FALLING.pages.CHOICE.des:
While in free fall you consider your options:
Land safely with your greatest techniques.
Channel a Power to survive the fall.
Strike at the wall to hang on to it.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FALLING.pages.INITIAL.de:
As you head upwards hopping from one floating shape to another, you slip.

You begin to fall.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FALLING.pages.POWER.desc: Harnessing and expending some of your raw power, you manage to land unhurt.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FALLING.pages.SKILL.desc: You land with extreme grace before continuing on.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FALLING.title: Falling
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FORGOTTEN_ALTAR.pages.DE:
You lash out and smash the statue in front of you, breaking the magical hold the room had placed upon you.

A dark wail echoes all around you, and you can feel the [purple][sine]cursed magic[/sine][/purple] seep into your bones.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FORGOTTEN_ALTAR.pages.IN:
In front of you sits an altar to a forgotten god.

Atop the altar sits an ornate female statue with arms outstretched.

She calls out to you, demanding sacrifice.
Gain [green]{MaxHpGain}[/green] Max HP. Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FORGOTTEN_ALTAR.pages.OF:
As you gently set the idol onto the altar a [blue]cold wind[/blue] swirls throughout the room.

The arms of the statue begin to discolor and crumble.

Your [gold]Golden Idol[/gold] begins to dull in color and begins bleeding from its eyes.

The bleeding never ceases.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FORGOTTEN_ALTAR.pages.SA:
You stand on the altar and cut your wrists.

As the [red]blood[/red] spills out in sacrifice, the arms of the statue reach out and close around your eyes.

Everything goes dark.

You wake up a short time later feeling a new potential surging through you.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FORGOTTEN_ALTAR.title: Forgotten Altar
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.pages.BOULDE:
As you grab the Idol and stow it away, a giant boulder smashes through the ceiling into the ground next to you.

You realize that the floor is slanted downwards as the boulder starts to roll towards you.

As you grab the Idol and stow it away, a giant boulder smashes through the ceiling into the ground next to you.

You realize that the floor is slanted downwards as the boulder starts to roll towards you.
[jitter]SQUISH![/jitter]

The boulder flattens you a little as it passes by, but otherwise you can get out of here.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.pages.INITIA:
You come across an inconspicuous pedestal with a [gold]shining gold idol[/gold] sitting peacefully atop. It looks incredibly valuable.

You sure don't see any traps nearby.
Requires a Relic that can be traded.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.pages.JAM.de:
Thinking fast, you notice that the boulder, rolling down such a tight corridor, could potentially be stopped with a [sine]sturdy[/sine] object, such as the one you [blue]conveniently[/blue] happen to be holding.

Aiming with conviction, you throw the [gold]Golden Idol[/gold] at just the right spot at the right time, causing the boulder to come to a [jitter]halt[/jitter].

The force of the boulder's weight causes the [gold]idol[/gold] to [jitter]shatter[/jitter], and a piece of it lands right at your feet.
If there was ever an obvious trap, this would be it.

You decide not to interfere with objects placed upon pedestals.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.pages.OUTRUN:
[jitter]RUUUUUUUUUUN![/jitter]

You barely leap into a side passageway as the boulder rushes by. Unfortunately it feels like you sprained something however.
You throw yourself at the boulder with everything you have. When the dust clears, you can make a safe way out.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.pages.SWITCH:
...Surely this [sine]must[/sine] be a trap, right?

Just in case, you place your [gold]{Relic}[/gold] on the pedestal while simultaneously snatching the [gold]idol[/gold].

Nothing happens. Seems you're in the [blue]clear[/blue].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.title: Golden Idol
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_SHRINE.title: Golden Shrine
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_SHRINE.pages.INIT: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to an ancient spirit.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_SHRINE.pages.PRAY: As your hand touches the shrine, [gold]gold[/gold] rains from the ceiling [sine]showering[/sine] [sine]you[/sine] [sine]in[/sine] [sine]riches.[/sine]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_SHRINE.pages.DESE:
Each time you strike the shrine, [gold]gold[/gold] pours forth again and again!

As you pocket the riches, something [red]weighs heavily on you[/red].
"WHAT IS IT YOU SEEK? WHAT IS IT YOU OFFER?"

In sync with its final words, the door behind you [jitter]slams shut.[/jitter]
Obtain a random Colorless card. Lose [red]{CardCost}[/red] HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-KNOWING_SKULL.pages.CARD:
"PERHAPS THIS WILL HELP?"

You obtain a card.

"ANYTHING ELSE?"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-KNOWING_SKULL.pages.GOLD:
"YOU MORTALS NEVER CHANGE. IT IS DONE."

[gold]Gold[/gold] rains down on you!

"ANYTHING ELSE?"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-KNOWING_SKULL.pages.INIT: You find yourself in an old, decorated chamber. In the center of the room, a large skull sits atop an ornate pedestal. As you approach, the skull [green][jitter]bursts into flames[/jitter][/green] and turns to face you.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-KNOWING_SKULL.pages.LEAV:
"BEHIND YOU, MORTAL."

You peek behind the skull. Surely enough, there is a door.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-KNOWING_SKULL.pages.POTI:
"DRINK UP!"

You obtain a potion.

"ANYTHING ELSE?"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-KNOWING_SKULL.title: Knowing Skull
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LAB.title: Lab
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LAB.pages.INITIAL.descri:
You find yourself in a room filled with racks of test tubes, beakers, flasks, forceps, pinch clamps, stirring rods, tongs, goggles, funnels, pipets, cylinders, condensers, and even a rare spiral tube of glass.

Why do you know the name of all these tools? It doesn't matter, you take a look around.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LAB.pages.RANSACK.descri: You [sine]clumsily[/sine] wade through the room, knocking over some expensive-looking equipment as you go, until...aha! A tiny, [jitter]worn[/jitter] [gold]potion belt![/gold]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LIVING_WALL.pages.INITIA:
As you come to a dead-end and begin to turn around, walls [jitter]slam down[/jitter] from the ceiling, trapping you!

 Three faces materialize from the walls and speak.

[blue]"Forget what you know, and I'll let you go."[/blue]

[purple]"I require change to see a new space."[/purple]

[gold]"If you want to pass me, then you must grow."[/gold]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LIVING_WALL.pages.RESULT: Satisfied, the walls in front of you merge back into the ceiling, leaving a path forward.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LIVING_WALL.title: Living Wall
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MASKED_BANDITS.pages.BRA:
Oh! A [blue]new recruit![/blue]
You should have identified yourself [jitter]earlier![/jitter]
Now, let me show ya how to shake some suckers down the [red]Red Mask Gang[/red] way...
Got it? Now go out there and [blue]collect[/blue] some of that sweet sweet [gold]Gold[/gold]! And remember, we meet once a week out behind [gold]Wongo's[/gold] to distribute the goods!
What, ya [jitter]nervous[/jitter] or somethin'? I said get out there!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MASKED_BANDITS.pages.INI:
You encounter a group of bandits wearing large [red]red masks.[/red]
"Hello, pay up to pass... a reasonable fee of [jitter]ALL[/jitter] your [gold]Gold[/gold] will do! Heh heh!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MASKED_BANDITS.pages.PAI:
Hehehe.. Thanks for the [gold]gold![/gold]
Oh, I love [gold]gold.[/gold] It's so nice.
[sine]shiny[/sine] [sine]shiny[/sine] chits they are!

Hey [blue]Bear,[/blue] hey!
This guy gave us all his [gold]gold![/gold] What a sucker, right?
Get this, I just had to ask nicely. Who knew?!
I certainly didn't! What a chump!

Gang, let's all have a laugh for this wondrous occasion!
[jitter]Hahaah[/jitter]
[jitter]Ho[/jitter] [jitter]HOH[/jitter] [sine]hoho![/sine]
[sine]Hoh![/sine]

Oh? You're still here?
Did you overhear something? Didn't think so.
[red][jitter]*snerk*[/jitter][/red] [sine]...loser....[/sine] [jitter]Hahaha[/jitter] [sine]haaah[/sine]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MASKED_BANDITS.title: Masked Bandits
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MATCH_AND_KEEP.title: Match and Keep!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MATCH_AND_KEEP.pages.INI: A gremlin is madly shuffling cards on a table. This monster seems to be a harmless one. You approach him out of curiosity.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MATCH_AND_KEEP.pages.RUL:
"[blue]Twelve cards![/blue] Match them to keep them! [blue]Five[/blue] tries, no do-overs.
Are you ready? Let's start!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MATCH_AND_KEEP.pages.COM:
You complete the gremlin's game and look up.
He disappeared?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MIND_BLOOM.pages.GOLD.de: Can it really be this easy?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MIND_BLOOM.pages.HEAL.de: Can it really be this easy?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MIND_BLOOM.pages.INITIAL:
While walking and traversing through the chaos of the Spire, your thoughts suddenly begin to feel very... [purple][sine]real...[/sine][/purple]

Imaginings of [red]monsters[/red] and [gold]riches[/gold] begin to manifest themselves into reality.
The sensation is quickly fleeting. What do you do?
Fight a Boss from [gold]Exordium[/gold] to obtain a random [gold]Rare Relic[/gold].
[green]Heal to full HP.[/green] Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL of your cards. Obtain [gold]Mark of the Bloom[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MIND_BLOOM.pages.UPGRADE:
Everything makes sense now.
The lack of memories, the ascent, the [gold]Ancient One.[/gold]

This is the way it always was.
This is the way it always will be.
All will be forgotten again soon...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MIND_BLOOM.title: Mind Bloom
Reaching carefully into the mouth of the [blue]stone head[/blue], you collect some of the more fresh [red]blood[/red] from its molars and store it in one of your vials.

It's not like anyone was using that [red]blood[/red] anyway, right?
You stumble across something that feels *very* out of place. Before you, an enormous stony head emerges from a large wall segment that does not shift and change like the rest of this area.
The head's mouth is wide open, and it reveals large intimidating teeth stained red with blood. The surface of the statue is riddled with pictographs that seem to indicate people throwing themselves into the mouth of this head and being devoured. Why would anyone do that?
[green]Heal to full HP.[/green] Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] Max HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MOAI_HEAD.pages.LEAVE.de: You leave, wondering what could have been.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MOAI_HEAD.pages.OFFER_ID: You jump back a little as the gigantic molars smash down on the idol, smashing it into dust. As the teeth start to rise up again, [gold]gold[/gold] pours forth in a torrent from the opening, flooding you with riches.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MOAI_HEAD.pages.PRAY.des:
At first when you step up into the mouth of the statue, nothing happens. As you start to feel more than a little foolish, the huge molars slam down from above, crushing you whole.
[jitter]Darkness.[/jitter]
Sometime later from within the dark, you see a sliver of light, and hear what you now realize is the sound of stony teeth slowly rising upwards.


You leave confused.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MOAI_HEAD.title: The Moai Head
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MUSHROOMS.pages.EAT.desc:
You give in to the unnatural desire to eat. As you consume mushroom after mushroom, you feel yourself entering into a daze and pass out.
As you awake, you feel very odd. You [green]Heal 25% of your HP[/green], but you also get [red]infected[/red].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MUSHROOMS.pages.FIGHT.de:
[jitter][red]Ambushed!![/red][/jitter]
Rodents infested by the mushrooms appear out of nowhere!
You enter a corridor full of [sine]hypnotizing[/sine] [sine]colored[/sine] [sine]mushrooms.[/sine]
Due to your lack of specialization in mycology you are unable to identify the specimens.
You want to escape, but feel oddly compelled to eat a [sine]mushroom...[/sine]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MUSHROOMS.title: Hypnotizing Colored Mushrooms
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MYSTERIOUS_SPHERE.loss: {character} opened the [gold][b]{event}[/b][/gold] and found death inside.
Ducking behind some nearby cover, you pick up a conveniently placed [gold]rock[/gold] and throw it in a direction away from the bony sphere.
As the sentries the noise, you quickly run over to the sphere and rummage through it.
With limited time to search, you are able to find [blue]something[/blue] inside.

Jutting from the chaotic terrain around you, a bony sphere surrounds a mysterious glowing object within.
While you are curious what lies inside, you notice some sentries keeping an eye on it.
Fight to obtain a random [gold]Rare Relic[/gold].
As soon as you strike the sphere, the sentries spring to life around you!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MYSTERIOUS_SPHERE.title: Mysterious Sphere
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTH.pages.INITIAL.desc:
An odd creature with a hunched back sprouting several tentacles is scrounging through a pile of trash and debris in front of you. As you approach, he shuffles towards you in a non-threatening manner.

"N'loth hungry. Feed N'loth."
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTH.pages.INITIAL_REBA: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTH.pages.LEAVE.descri: You shake your head. N'loth hunches even further and sighs, then scuttles away.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTH.pages.SEARCH_WITH_: Choose a Common Card to Add to Your [gold]Deck[/gold].

You sift through the pile of trash with N'loth for hours, trying to find [jitter]something[/jitter] for him to eat.

Unfortunately, despite your best efforts, N'loth shambles away, not having found anything of substance. You, however, found [sine][gold]something[/gold][/sine] that might be useful(?) for your climb.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTH.pages.TRADE.descri:
Holding the [gold]relic[/gold] out towards him, N'loth snatches it out of your hand with his tentacles, dislocates his jaw, and slurps down your offer in one quick gulp.

He gives you a large, toothy grin as more tentacles appear from behind his cloak, these ones brandishing an impossibly neat looking box. He pushes it towards you until you take it.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTH.title: N'loth
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OLD_BEGGAR.pages.GAVE_GO:
The beggar takes off its cloak to reveal that he is [blue]Cleric[/blue]!

[jitter]"You are a kind soul. Receive my purification!"[/jitter] he screams.

You are unsure if he is grateful or mad.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OLD_BEGGAR.pages.INITIAL: An old beggar cloaked in fur reaches his hands out towards you as you pass. "Spare some coin, child?"
Give [blue]{GoldCost}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a random card with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] [blue]{EnchantmentAmount}[/blue]. Add [red]Clumsy[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OLD_BEGGAR.pages.KEEP_WA:
Not wanting to forfeit your hard-earned [gold]gold[/gold], you [purple]swiftly[/purple] turn to make an escape. However, while distancing yourself from the [blue]beggar[/blue], you trip over your own feet.

Embarassing.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OLD_BEGGAR.pages.LEAVE.d:
The beggar looks to the floor as you pass.

"You will never make a difference... You never do."
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OLD_BEGGAR.pages.REMOVE_:
[jitter]"I hope you do better this time, friend!"[/jitter] he shouts.

Wondering what was implied by this, you push forward.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OLD_BEGGAR.title: Old Beggar
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OMINOUS_FORGE.title: Ominous Forge
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OMINOUS_FORGE.pages.INIT: You duck into a small hut. Inside, you find what appears to be a forge. The smithing tools are covered with dust, yet a fire roars inside the furnace. You feel on edge...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OMINOUS_FORGE.pages.FORG:
You decide to put the forge to use and...
[jitter][gold]CLANG[/gold][/jitter] [jitter][gold]CLAAANG[/gold][/jitter] [jitter][gold]CLANG![/gold][/jitter]
...improve your arsenal!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OMINOUS_FORGE.pages.RUMM:
You decide to see if you can find anything of use. After uncovering tarps, looking through boxes, and checking nooks and crannies, you find a dust covered [gold]relic![/gold]

Taking the relic, you can't shake a sudden feeling of [red][sine]sharp[/sine] [sine]pain[/sine][/red] as you exit the hut. Maybe you disturbed some sort of spirit?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-OMINOUS_FORGE.pages.LEAV: There doesn't seem to be anything of use. You exit the way you came, the flames of the furnace casting [purple][sine]eerie[/sine] [sine]shadows[/sine][/purple] on the walls inside the hut...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PLEADING_VAGRANT.pages.I:
While sneaking past a group of shrouded figures, one of them approaches you.

"Got anything for me friend? Please... maybe some [gold]Coin[/gold]?"

"I just need somewhere to stay, I have treasures I can trade..."

He seems delusional, but harmless.
Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Shame[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PLEADING_VAGRANT.pages.P: "Oh yes, [sine]yes![/sine] Here here, a fair trade!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PLEADING_VAGRANT.pages.R:
You snatch the precious [gold]relic[/gold] from his clutches and walk away.

From behind you hear,

"Have you no shame? [sine]HAVE YOU NO SHAAAAAME?![/sine]"

You have some [purple]shame[/purple].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PLEADING_VAGRANT.title: Pleading Vagrant
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PURIFIER.title: Purifier
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PURIFIER.pages.INITIAL.d: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PURIFIER.pages.INITIAL_R: [gold]Remove[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] Max HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-PURIFIER.pages.PRAY.desc: As you kneel in reverence, you feel a weight lifted off your shoulders.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SCRAP_OOZE.pages.BLOAT.d:
You realize the poor creature is close to [jitter]popping[/jitter] due to how [green]gorged[/green] it is.

Your [gold]Gold[/gold] melts away as you shovel it into the creature's opening, until suddenly it [jitter][red]violenty explodes[/red][/jitter]!

You are able to navigate your way to the [gold]relic[/gold], which miraculously remains intact.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SCRAP_OOZE.pages.FAIL.de:
[red][jitter]Ouch![/jitter][/red]

All you find is corroded metal and a bit of [red][jitter]burning pain.[/jitter][/red]

However, you're still convinced there's a [gold]relic[/gold]...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SCRAP_OOZE.pages.INITIAL: As you walk into the room you hear a [sine]gurgling[/sine] and the [jitter]grinding[/jitter] of metals. Before you is a slime-like creature that ate too much scrap for its own good. From the center of the creature you see glints of strange light, perhaps something magical? It looks like you can get some [gold]treasure[/gold] if you just reach inside its... opening. However, the acid and sharp objects may [red]hurt[/red].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SCRAP_OOZE.pages.LEAVE.d:
You decide to leave the area.

The slime pays no attention, content with its meal.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SCRAP_OOZE.pages.SUCCESS:
[green]Success![/green]

After rummaging through the metal and burning acid, you finally grab hold of a [gold]relic[/gold] and yank it out.

You pull your way out of the ooze [red]damaged[/red] but rewarded.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SCRAP_OOZE.title: Scrap Ooze
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SECRET_PORTAL.minigame.i:
Select a node to be able to change its type.

Each node type costs [gold]points[/gold]. Stay within your budget of [blue]{Budget}[/blue] to proceed.

[red]Empty[/red] nodes will be skipped when the new map generates, allowing you to carve a [blue]shorter path[/blue] if you wish.

You may also [gold]randomize[/gold] your path, which [red]can only be done once.[/red] Randomizing the path [red]can't generate Empty nodes, will lock all nodes, and ignore budget.[/red]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SECRET_PORTAL.pages.ENTE:
Jumping through the portal, your sense of time and space is completely torn apart.

As you reorient yourself to the new surroundings, you realize that right before you is a fearsome battle.

Jumping through the portal, you are met with several [jitter]more[/jitter] portals!

All of them seem to take you to the same place, however. You stop jumping through portals after entering one you feel particularly [green]good[/green] about.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SECRET_PORTAL.pages.INIT:
Before you is a sight that seems out of place in the alien landscape around you. Strangely placed into one of the living walls of the Beyond is an enclosed stone entrance filled with a [purple][sine]swirling[/sine] [sine]magical[/sine] [sine]portal.[/sine][/purple]

You aren't sure where it leads, but maybe it could speed your journey through the Spire.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SECRET_PORTAL.pages.LEAV: Careful and cautious seems the better approach for reaching the top of the Spire. Ignoring the portal you continue on.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SECRET_PORTAL.pages.REAC:
Unsure what to think of the [purple]portal[/purple], you slowly reach your hand into it...

A sudden [jitter][gold]shock[/gold][/jitter] courses throughout your entire body, causing you to extract your hand from the [purple]portal's entrance[/purple]. Then, the entrance [sine][blue]dissipates.[/blue][/sine]

What just happened?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SECRET_PORTAL.title: Secret Portal
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SENSORY_STONE.loss: {character} was lost in the memories of the [gold][b]{event}[/b][/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SENSORY_STONE.pages.INIT: Navigating through the Beyond, you discover a [blue]glowing tesseract[/blue] [jitter]spinning[/jitter] and [sine]shifting[/sine] gently in the air.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SENSORY_STONE.pages.INTR:
You touch it.

A [red][jitter]sharp[/jitter] [jitter]pain[/jitter][/red] flows through you, followed by vivid flashes of a distant memory.
...whose memories are these?
Lose [red]{Dmg2}[/red] HP. Gain [blue]2[/blue] Colorless card rewards.
Lose [red]{Dmg3}[/red] HP. Gain [blue]3[/blue] Colorless card rewards.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SENSORY_STONE.pages.MEMO:
[red][sine]FEAR.[/sine][/red]

A demonic creature towers above you, wings spread wide as it howls with laughter. Dead bodies of a tribe surround you while the village is engulfed in terrible [purple][sine]dark[/sine] [sine]flames.[/sine][/purple]

The demon calls out, taunting you.

"[red][jitter]YOU[/jitter] [jitter]REALLY[/jitter] [jitter]ARE[/jitter] [jitter]THE[/jitter] [jitter]STRONGEST[/jitter] [jitter]NOW![/jitter] [jitter]Haha..[/jitter] [jitter]HEHE...[/jitter] [jitter]HAHAHAAAAH!![/jitter][/red]"

This laughter echoes forever...

[green][sine]TRIUMPH.[/sine][/green]

The remains of a [purple][sine]ghostly[/sine] [sine]creature[/sine][/purple] sink slowly into the mud before you, barely visible in the moonlight. You have proven yourself amongst your sisters.

Standing victoriously, you wait in silence as the others ceremoniously place the [gold]creature's skull[/gold] atop your head. The ritual has concluded.

You head towards the Spire...

[blue][sine]CONFUSION.[/sine][/blue]

[gold][OBJECTIVE][/gold] [green]BALANCE must be ENFORCED[/green]
[gold][DEFINE][/gold] [green]BALANCE[/green]
[gold][ERROR][/gold] [green]BALANCE NOT FOUND[/green]
[gold][DEFINE][/gold] [green]BALANCE[/green]
[gold][ERROR][/gold] [green]BALANCE NOT FOUND[/green]
[gold][WARNING][/gold] [red]Large object approaching[/red]

[sine]"I...[/sine] [sine]..am[/sine] [sine]....Neow.."[/sine]

[purple][sine]SERENITY.[/sine][/purple]

Two primitive creatures fight over a carcass on the side of the road. You observe, devoid of emotion.
[gold]Watch. Remember. Live.[/gold] This is the Watcher's mission.

Recently, one of your peers had stopped reporting on their assignment: a Spire of unknown origin.

As the fight ends, you continue onward, unfazed by the bloody scene that took place.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SENSORY_STONE.title: Sensory Stone
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SHINING_LIGHT.pages.BASK:
Standing at a safe distance from the [gold]light[/gold], you [sine]spread[/sine] your arms wide open as you close your eyes, basking in the light's [purple]enchanting[/purple], [sine]warm[/sine] glow.

After some time, you feel [blue]invigorated[/blue], as though you are destined to dole out some well deserved slaps.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SHINING_LIGHT.pages.ENTE:
As you walk through the light, you notice that the light is absorbed into you.

It's [red][jitter]scorching hot[/jitter][/red]! However, the pain quickly recedes.

You feel [blue]invigorated[/blue], as though you received a well deserved slap.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SHINING_LIGHT.pages.INIT:
You find a shimmering [gold]mass of light[/gold] encompassing the center of the room.

Its [sine]warm glow[/sine] and [sine]enchanting patterns[/sine] invite you in.
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a random Attack in your [gold]Deck[/gold] with [purple]Burn Bright[/purple].
Requires an Attack that can be Enchanted.
Lose [red]{Damage}[/red] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SHINING_LIGHT.pages.LEAV: You walk around it, wondering what could have been.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SHINING_LIGHT.title: Shining Light
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSSERPENT.pages.AGREE.d:
[sine]"Yeeeeeeessssssssssessss![/sine]

[sine]Thisss will all be worthhh it.[/sine]

[sine]..ssSSs..... ss... sssss....!"[/sine]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSSERPENT.pages.DISAGRE: The serpent stares at you with a look of extreme disappointment.

[jitter]"NNNoOOoooo!!!![/jitter] Think about what you could buy with the [gold][sine]riches!![/sine][/gold]"

The serpent forces [gold]something[/gold] into your hands as you leave.

It does not change your answer.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSSERPENT.pages.INITIAL:
You walk into a room to find a large hole in the ground. As you approach the hole, an enormous serpent creature appears from within.

[sine]"Ho hooo! Hello hello! what have we got here?[/sine] Hello adventurer, I ask a simple question.

The most fulfilling of lives is that in which you can [gold][sine]buy anything![/sine][/gold]

Do you agree?"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSSERPENT.pages.TAKE_GO:
The serpent rears its head and blasts a stream of [gold]gold[/gold] upwards!

It is amazing and terrifying simultaneously.

You gather all the [gold]gold[/gold], thank the snake, and get going.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSSERPENT.title: The Ssssserpent
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_DIVINE_FOUNTAIN.page: You come across [blue]shimmering[/blue] [blue]water[/blue] flowing endlessly from a fountain on a nearby wall.
Gain [green]3[/green] Max HP for each [red]Curse[/red] in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. ([green]{MaxHpGain}[/green])
As you drink the [blue]water[/blue], you feel a [purple]dark grasp[/purple] loosen.
As you wash yourself with this [blue]water[/blue], you feel protected against the [purple]dark grasp[/purple] looming over you.
Unsure of the nature of this water, you continue on your way, parched.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_JOUST.pages.BET_MURD:
"I can't believe you're betting against [gold]Noodles[/gold]!"

Furious, he clamps down his helmet and rushes towards his nemesis.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_JOUST.pages.BET_OWNE:
"Give me strength, [gold]Noodles[/gold]!"

Clamping down his helmet, the knight charges forward.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_JOUST.pages.EXPLANAT:
"Today is the day I must settle the score with the [red]murderer[/red] of my beloved pet, [gold]Noodles[/gold]. Until then, you may not pass.

Fellow witness, why don't you [blue]bet[/blue] on who you think will emerge victorious?"
As you make your way through the large buildings you come across a long narrow bridge and spot knights on either side, facing one another. You approach...

[jitter]"Halt!"[/jitter]

A knight forcefully gestures you to stop with its giant lance.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_JOUST.pages.MURDERER:
The owner died.

You [red]lost[/red] the bet, but at least you weren't gouged by a lance.

The owner died.

You [green]win[/green] the bet. Unsure what to think, you grab your winnings and leave.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_JOUST.pages.OWNER_WI:
The nemesis was slain.

You [red]lost[/red] the bet, but at least you weren't gouged by a lance.

The nemesis was slain.

You [green]win[/green] the bet. Unsure what to think, you grab your winnings and leave.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_JOUST.title: The Joust
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_LIBRARY.pages.INITIA:
You come across an ornate building which appears abandoned.

A plaque that has been torn free from a wall is on the floor. It reads, [blue]"THE LIBRARY"[/blue].

Inside, you find countless rows of scrolls, manuscripts, and books.

You pick one and cozy yourself into a chair for some quiet time.
Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{CardChoiceCount}[/blue] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_LIBRARY.pages.READ.d:
The story is about an insect-controlling teenage girl who aspires to become a hero. The book is filled with creative uses of powers, combat strategies, and varying perspectives.

Satisfying.

The story is about a man who journeyed beyond the stars and found himself stuck on a desolate foreign planet. Ingenuity, luck, perseverance, and humor to retain his sanity were his tools to return home.

Fascinating.

The story takes place in a giant isolated building underground as the outside conditions have become unbearable. The novel is mired with conspiracies, propaganda, and injustice. You ponder if similar dynamics are at play within the Spire.

Unsettling.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_LIBRARY.pages.READ.s: Add a card to your Deck.
Reading is for chumps.

You doze off in a comfy chair instead.

[sine]Zzz...[/sine] [sine]zzz...[/sine] [sine]..Zz....[/sine]

You wake up feeling refreshed.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_LIBRARY.title: The Library
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_MAUSOLEUM.pages.INIT:
Venturing through a series of tombs, you are faced with a large sarcophagus [sine]studded with gems[/sine] in the center of a circular room.

You cannot make out the writing on the coffin, however, you do notice [purple][sine]black fog[/sine][/purple] seeping out from the sides.
Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_MAUSOLEUM.pages.LEAV: You continue along your way, leaving the forgotten dead undisturbed.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_MAUSOLEUM.pages.OPEN: You push open the coffin. As you do, [purple][sine]black fog[/sine][/purple] spews forth and covers the entire room! Inside, you find no body, only a [gold][sine]relic[/sine][/gold]. You take it and move onwards, [red][jitter]coughing violently.[/jitter][/red]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_MAUSOLEUM.pages.PAY_:
Upon closer inspection, you notice a [blue]plethora of gifts[/blue] lining the bottom of the sarcophagus. Whoever lies within the [gold]gem-studded structure[/gold] must have been truly [purple]beloved.[/purple] You are [sine]compelled[/sine] to leave a [gold]gift[/gold] of your own.

Placing your [gold]{SacrificeRelic}[/gold] near the other gifts, you think you hear a faint whisper. Was it your [purple]imagination?[/purple]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_MAUSOLEUM.title: The Mausoleum
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_NEST.pages.INITIAL.d: A long line of [blue][sine]hooded figures[/sine][/blue] can be seen entering an [purple]unassuming cathedral[/purple].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_NEST.pages.INVESTIGA:
Naturally, you join the line and are quickly surrounded by [red]Cultists![/red]

They ignore you as they gleefully [jitter]chant[/jitter] and [sine]wave[/sine] their weapons around.

[red][jitter]"MURDER!! MURDER MURDER!!"[/jitter][/red]
[blue][sine]"CAW CAW CAAAAAWWW!"[/sine][/blue]
[red][jitter]"MURDER! MURDER MUURDER!!"[/jitter][/red]
[blue][sine]"CAAW CAW CAAAAAAWW!!"[/sine][/blue]

You eye a [gold]Donation Box[/gold]...
Add [gold]Ritual Dagger[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_NEST.pages.JOIN.desc:
You decide to stay in line (out of fear) to see what will happen.

Eventually, you are face-to-face with the leader. A well-dressed cultist hands you an [gold]Ornate Dagger[/gold]. Like the others before you, you slash your forearm and let the blood drip into a misshapen bowl.

The cultists [jitter]chant[/jitter] and [jitter]holler[/jitter] for you!

[blue][sine]"CAAW CAW CAAAAAAWW!!"[/sine][/blue]

You chant, too. Why not?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_NEST.title: The Nest
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-THE_WOMAN_IN_BLUE.title: The Woman in Blue
From the darkness, an arm pulls you into a small shop. As your eyes adjust, you see a pale woman in sharp clothes gesturing towards a wall of potions.
"Buy a potion. Now!" she states.

"Good. Now leave."
You exit the shop cautiously.

[jitter][red]WHAM[/red][/jitter]
Her gloved fist collides with your face, nearly knocking you off your feet.
"Get out before I litter the floor with your guts." You take her word and exit with your guts still safely in your body.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-TOMB_OF_LORD_RED_MASK.pa: A highly ornamented tomb can be seen on the other side of a floating path. Upon reaching the tomb, you notice a slot for [gold]gold[/gold] coins with a scratched out inscription above it.
[red]Lose ALL of your Gold.[/red]. Obtain [gold]Red Mask[/gold].
An opening appears in the tomb and out slides a small red mask with a note attached. "Take from others as I have taken from you!"

You don't know what's instilling such [jitter][purple]deep fear[/purple][/jitter] into you. Is it the [blue]overwhelming presence[/blue] of the tomb? Have you been in the twisted land of [gold]The Beyond[/gold] for too long?

Regardless, you find yourself on your feet, [sine]running away[/sine] from the tomb as fast as you can.

This experience will [red]haunt you[/red] for a long time.

You don the mask and the tomb starts to [sine]flake[/sine] [sine]away...[/sine] a secret passage!

The passage is lined with countless stolen goods and mounds of [gold]gold![/gold]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-TRANSMOGRIFIER.title: Transmogrifier
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-TRANSMOGRIFIER.pages.INI: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.
Lose [red]{KneelMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold], then [gold]Upgrade[/gold] them.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-TRANSMOGRIFIER.pages.PRA: As the power of the shrine flows through you, your mind feels altered.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-UPGRADE_SHRINE.title: Upgrade Shrine
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-UPGRADE_SHRINE.pages.INI: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.
Lose [red]{KneelDamage}[/red] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-UPGRADE_SHRINE.pages.PRA: The shrine's energy flows into you, making you stronger.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-VAMPIRES.pages.ACCEPT.de:
The tall figure grabs your arm, pulls you forward, and sinks his fangs into your neck. You feel a [purple][jitter]dark force[/jitter][/purple] pour into your neck and [purple][jitter]course[/jitter][/purple] through your body.

...

You wake up some time later, alone. An intense [sine]hunger[/sine] passes through your belly. You [red]must feed[/red]...
You are a bit [blue]flabbergasted[/blue] by the offer you have just received. The tallest of the hooded figures steps forward, pulling a tiny, ornate machine out of their pocket.

"Very well. Even if you don't wish to join us, you can still [gold]help us out[/gold]."

"Go forth, and fill the [red]vessel.[/red] We'll be back to collect later..."
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-VAMPIRES.pages.INITIAL.d:
Navigating an unlit street, you come across several hooded figures in the midst of some dark ritual. As you approach, they turn to you in eerie unison. The tallest among them bares fanged teeth and extends a long, pale hand towards you.

[sine]"Join us, and feel the warmth of the Spire."[/sine]
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-VAMPIRES.pages.INITIAL.o: [gold]Remove[/gold] all [gold]Strikes[/gold]. Add [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Bites[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [red]Lose[/red] [blue]{MaxHpLoss}[/blue] Max HP.
Lose [gold]Blood Vial[/gold]. [gold]Remove[/gold] all [gold]Strikes[/gold]. Add [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Bites[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-VAMPIRES.pages.LEAVE.des:
You step back and raise your weapon in defiance. The tall figure sighs. "Very well." The entire group of hooded figures morph into a thick black fog that flows away from you.

You are alone once more.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-VAMPIRES.pages.VIAL.desc:
The pale figures gasp as you take out the [gold]Blood Vial[/gold].

[sine]"The master's blood... the master's blood![/sine] [purple][jitter]THE MASTER'S BLOOD!"[/jitter][/purple]

They all chant fervently as the tall one bows before you. "Drink from His blood, and become one with [gold][sine]Him."[/sine][/gold]

The chant growing louder, you consume the contents of the vial. Your vision immediately [sine]warps[/sine] and fades to darkness.

You wake up some time later, alone. An intense [sine]hunger[/sine] passes through your belly. You [red]must feed[/red].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-VAMPIRES.title: Vampires(?)
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WE_MEET_AGAIN.title: We Meet Again!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WE_MEET_AGAIN.pages.INIT:
"We meet again!"
A cheery disheveled fellow approaches you gleefully. You do not know this man.

"It's me, [gold]Ranwid![/gold] Have any goods for me today? The usual? A fella like me can't make it alone, you know?"
You eye him suspiciously and consider your options...
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WE_MEET_AGAIN.pages.GIVE:
"Exquisite! Was feeling parched."
[blue][sine]Glup[/sine] [sine]glup[/sine] [sine]glup[/sine][/blue]

He downs the potion in one go and lets out a satisfied [jitter]burp.[/jitter]

He rummages around his various pockets...
"Here, look what I've got for you today! Take it take it!"

"Magnificent! This will be quite handy if I run into those [red]mask wearing hoodlums[/red] again."

He rummages around his various pockets...
"Here, look what I've got for you today! Take it take it!"

"Exemplary! I shall study this further in my chambers."

He rummages around his various pockets...
"Here, look what I've got for you today! Take it take it!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WE_MEET_AGAIN.pages.ATTA:
"[jitter]Aaaaagghh!![/jitter] What a jerk you are sometimes!"
He runs away.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WHEEL_OF_CHANGE.title: Wheel of Change
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WHEEL_OF_CHANGE.pages.IN:
You come upon a dapper looking, cheery gremlin.
"It's time to spin the wheel! Are you [sine]R[/sine] [sine]E[/sine] [sine]A[/sine] [sine]D[/sine] [sine]Y[/sine] [sine]?[/sine] Of course you are!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WHEEL_OF_CHANGE.pages.CU:
"Looks like you won a [purple]Curse![/purple]
That's not good.
Oh well! Better luck next time!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WHEEL_OF_CHANGE.pages.RE:
"Ohh, the power of [red][sine]darkness...[/sine][/red]
Choose a card to remove from your deck!"
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WHEEL_OF_CHANGE.pages.DA:
"Uh oh!
You lose!"
You spot him readying a shiv...

You slash at the crazy gremlin but he's simply too quick!
He gets you a few times with a crude shiv.
"The price has been paid!!"
and with that, both the gremlin and its wheel disappear in a puff of smoke.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WINDING_HALLS.pages.CHOI:
Passing by a structure you are certain you have previously seen you start to question if you are going insane, or if the impossible geography of this place is starting to get to you. You need to change something, and soon.

That's what the [purple][sine]voices[/sine][/purple] say anyway, and why would they lie?
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WINDING_HALLS.pages.INIT:
As you slowly make your way up the twisting pathways, you constantly find yourself losing your way as the walls and ground seem to inexplicably shift before your eyes.

The constant [purple][sine]whispering[/sine] [sine]voices[/sine][/purple] in the back of your head aren't helping things either.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WINDING_HALLS.pages.MADN:
Something in you cracks.

Only the truly mad can understand a place like this, so you give into the chattering voices and continue on with a [purple]"new"[/purple] perspective.
Things do seem to make so much more sense now.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WINDING_HALLS.pages.RETR:
You spend what seems like an eternity lost in the maze. Slowly but surely, you are able to retrace your steps, reorient yourself, and make it out of the twisting passages.

You feel [red][sine]drained[/sine][/red] from the experience.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WINDING_HALLS.pages.WRIT:
As you take a moment to stop and carefully observe the undulating landscape around you, the hint of a pattern starts to emerge from within the randomness. Whenever the demented noises begin to interrupt your thoughts, you struggle through the mental pain and ignore it.

Eventually you successfully map out a path forward, and continue on, now resistant to the nefarious nature of this alien place.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WINDING_HALLS.title: Winding Halls
Someone once told you of a cult that worshipped a giant bird. As you kneel in prayer, you begin to [sine]feel[/sine]... [sine]lightheaded[/sine].

You wake up some time later, feeling strangely fleet of foot.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WING_STATUE.pages.ATTACK:
With all your might, you hack away at the statue.

It soon [red]crumbles[/red], revealing a [gold]pile of gold[/gold]. You grab as much as you can and continue onwards.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WING_STATUE.pages.INITIA:
Among the stone and boulders, you notice an intricate large blue statue resembling a wing.

You find [gold]gold[/gold] spilling from its cracks. Maybe there is more inside...
Lose [red]{Damage}[/red] HP. Remove [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
Requires an Attack that deals [blue]{RequiredDamage}[/blue] or more damage.
The statue makes you feel [sine]uneasy[/sine]. You walk past and continue onward.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WING_STATUE.title: Wing Statue
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WORLD_OF_GOOP.pages.GATH: Feeling the sting of the goop as the prolonged exposure starts to melt away at your skin, you manage to fish out the [gold]gold[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WORLD_OF_GOOP.pages.INIT:
You fall into a puddle.

[jitter]IT'S MADE OF[/jitter] [green][jitter]SLIME GOOP!![/jitter][/green]

Frantically, you claw yourself out over several minutes as you feel the goop starting to burn.

You can feel goop in your ears, goop in your nose, goop everywhere.

Climbing out, you notice that some of your [gold]gold[/gold] is missing. Looking back to the puddle you see your missing coins combined with [gold]gold[/gold] from unfortunate adventurers mixed together in the puddle.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WORLD_OF_GOOP.pages.LEAV: You decide that mess is not worth it.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WORLD_OF_GOOP.title: World of Goop
